meta.title: Founder Support Programs — Global Database
meta.scope: The full founder-support landscape: accelerators, fellowships, talent investors, government programs and startup visas alongside founder residencies, hacker houses, coliving and startup campuses. Categorized by the canonical program taxonomy (see src/data/taxonomy.ts) rather than a residential/traditional split.
meta.note: Recruiting status reflects best-available public info as of June 2026 and changes frequently. Always confirm on the program's own site. Logos load via a multi-source loader (Clearbit → DuckDuckGo → Google favicon) with an initials fallback.

status_legend.rolling: Accepts applications on a rolling/always-open basis
status_legend.open: A specific cohort window is currently open
status_legend.closing-soon: Open but with an imminent deadline
status_legend.opening-soon: Next cohort applications announced, opening shortly
status_legend.closed: Latest cohort closed; check site for next cycle

programs.name: Founders, Inc. (f.inc)
programs.focus: AI, hardware, robotics, AR/VR, web3, consumer
programs.status_detail: Rolling applications; time-boxed residencies (4–7 wks). Up to $250K for 4–7%.
programs.highlight: 42,000 sq ft campus at Fort Mason with hardware lab, media studio, gym; desks for ~80 founders.

programs.name: South Park Commons
programs.status_detail: Spring 2026 cohort underway; Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026. Up to $1M ($400K for 7% + $600K next round).
programs.highlight: Offices in SF, NYC & Bangalore. Built for founders before they have an idea.

programs.name: South Park Commons — NYC
programs.status_detail: Fellows may work from the NYC office. Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026.
programs.highlight: East-coast hub of the SPC fellowship.

programs.name: South Park Commons — Bangalore
programs.status_detail: India hub of the SPC fellowship. Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026.
programs.highlight: Asia hub of the SPC fellowship.

programs.name: HF0 (Hacker Fellowship Zero)
programs.status_detail: 12-week live-in residency, ~10 founders. Up to $1M uncapped SAFE for 5%.
programs.highlight: Housed in the historic 22,000 sq ft Archbishop's Mansion by Alamo Square ('the Monastery of Code').
programs.notes: Live-in 12-week residency. Funding/equity reported inconsistently across sources ($125K/7% up to $1M uncapped/5%) — confirm current cohort terms on hf0.com before relying on a figure.

programs.name: AGI House SF
programs.status_detail: Events & residencies for AI builders; perched atop Twin Peaks.
programs.highlight: Brings hackathon culture back to SF; AGI House Ventures invests up to $1M.

programs.name: AGI House (Hillsborough)
programs.status_detail: Palatial AI hacker house with its own venture fund (separate from the SF house).
programs.highlight: The original Peninsula AGI House; AGI House Ventures backs residents.

programs.name: The Residency — SF Parc
programs.status_detail: 3-month cohorts: housing + co-working + community. 'College meets accelerator.'
programs.highlight: Flagship Presidio house; part of a global network of homes.
programs.notes: Provides housing, food and cash for ~3 months in exchange for equity; cohorts run 3–6 months. Network-wide terms (livetheresidency.com).

programs.name: The Residency — Arcadia (Berkeley)
programs.status_detail: 3-month live-in cohorts in the East Bay.
programs.highlight: Berkeley house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Homebrew (NYC)
programs.status_detail: 3-month live-in cohorts in NYC.
programs.highlight: East-coast house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Londinium
programs.status_detail: AI-focused 5-bedroom home connected to central London.
programs.highlight: London AI house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Bangalore
programs.status_detail: HSR Layout co-living with weekly successful-founder mentors.
programs.highlight: India house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Aurea (Berlin)
programs.focus: Deep tech — builders, scientists & engineers chasing breakthroughs
programs.status_detail: Aurea: sister house to Arcadia for those chasing breakthroughs; intense focus & deep collaboration.
programs.highlight: Berlin deep-tech house (Aurea) in The Residency network.

programs.name: Foundry (Foundry Coliving)
programs.status_detail: Residency-style coliving; 100+ founders & engineers have lived there.
programs.highlight: Self-styled 'Number One Hacker House' in SF.

programs.name: Accelr8
programs.status_detail: Where founders live: co-living + co-working community.
programs.highlight: Residency program blending housing and workspace for founders.

programs.name: STAK Space
programs.status_detail: Billed as the world's largest hacker house.
programs.highlight: Large-scale East Bay hacker house.

programs.name: FoundHer House
programs.status_detail: All-female co-living/working space for women founders.
programs.highlight: Designed to foster women-led tech startups.

programs.name: Startup Embassy
programs.status_detail: Established co-living for founders coming to the Valley.
programs.highlight: Long-running Silicon Valley founder house.

programs.name: Georgia Tech Hacker House
programs.status_detail: Collaborative 9-month build program for students.
programs.highlight: University-run hacker house for student founders.

programs.name: Casa Bernarda
programs.status_detail: Co-living & co-working space in the Yucatán.
programs.highlight: LatAm builder house in Mérida.

programs.name: AbadiaDev
programs.status_detail: Collaborative space for the Web3/crypto ecosystem.
programs.highlight: Argentina's Web3 builder community house.

programs.name: Hacker Paradise
programs.status_detail: Work-remotely co-living experience for productivity & community.
programs.highlight: Long-running global nomad/builder community.

programs.name: FR8 (Hacker Hotel)
programs.status_detail: Billed as the world's first 'hacker hotel.'
programs.highlight: Resort-style stay + collaborative tech environment.

programs.name: Pluto (AI Hacker House)
programs.status_detail: AI/robotics residential workspace (also Paris).
programs.highlight: Shared residential workspace for AI/robotics builders.

programs.name: HackerHouse.world
programs.status_detail: Network across Bordeaux, Berlin, Venice, Rome, Dublin & London.
programs.highlight: Multi-city European hacker-house network.

programs.name: Bali Hacker House (The Collective)
programs.status_detail: Residential hub for intense collaboration among builders.
programs.highlight: Southeast-Asia builder residence.

programs.name: Labsmart Hacker House
programs.status_detail: Opened July 2025 in HSR Layout; build-and-ship-daily ethos.
programs.highlight: Workspace for builders in Bangalore's startup hub.

programs.name: Build Club / Build Campus
programs.status_detail: 6-week AI residency; launching Build Campus as Australia's first permanent AI builder residency.
programs.highlight: Recreated SF hacker-house energy (AGI House, HF0, Founders Inc) in Australia.

programs.name: Edge Esmeralda
programs.status_detail: Month-long pop-up village May 30–Jun 27, 2026; includes founder residencies. Prototype for permanent village 'Esmeralda.'
programs.highlight: 500+ builders gather in Sonoma County; precursor to a permanent town.

programs.name: Neo (Accelerator / Residency)
programs.status_detail: Neo Residency: 3 months SF + 2-week Oregon bootcamp; $750K uncapped SAFE + $450K credits.
programs.highlight: Low-dilution residency replacing the original Neo Accelerator (Feb 2026).

programs.name: Forge — Bangalore (Cohort 1)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 1 live. Short live-in residency for 'the obsessed'; monthly 'Void' hackathon awards a black-ticket seat. Founders now backed by YC, EF & SPC.
programs.highlight: Born in Mumbai (Cohort 0, Mar 2026); 'a sanctuary for the contrarian.' EST 2026.

programs.name: Forge — Bali (Cohort 2)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 2 open. Closes Forge's first year across three cities (Mumbai → Bangalore → Bali).
programs.highlight: Bali leg of the Forge residency triad.

programs.name: Forge — Dubai (Cohort 3)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 3 announced as upcoming ('Dubai · soon').
programs.highlight: Forge's planned Middle East expansion.

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Sydney
programs.status_detail: Houses 'Billabong' (Drummoyne) & 'Banksia'; 9-resident homes with coworking + hardware lab. Runs a 14-day residency.
programs.highlight: Australia's hacker-house experiment — 'a campfire for founders, artists and researchers.'

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Melbourne
programs.status_detail: Melbourne home announced as launching soon.
programs.highlight: Arrayah's Victoria expansion.

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Brisbane
programs.status_detail: Brisbane home announced as launching soon.
programs.highlight: Arrayah's Queensland expansion.

programs.name: Network School
programs.focus: Builders, creators & founders; 'startup society' (learn, burn, earn)
programs.status_detail: Rolling enrollment on a hotel-turned-campus near Singapore; hundreds of residents. Planned locations in Miami, Dubai & Tokyo.
programs.highlight: Balaji Srinivasan's 'Network State' made physical — adjacent to, but broader than, a founder residency.
programs.notes: Paid membership, not an investor. Forest City, Johor, Malaysia (~1hr from Singapore). Began as a 90-day popup; reopened as a longer-term program.

programs.name: The Foundery
programs.focus: Turning founder-mindset individuals into investible companies
programs.status_detail: 90-day residency at 'Foundery Sanctum'; part school/accelerator/venture studio. Builders retain up to 25% equity; up to ~Rs 4 crore seed.
programs.highlight: High-profile Indian 'co-founder factory' from Zerodha's Nikhil Kamath & Future Group's Kishore Biyani.

programs.name: The Residency — Vienna
programs.status_detail: European house in The Residency network; 3-month live-in cohorts.
programs.highlight: Vienna house in The Residency network.

programs.name: Founders House — Stockholm
programs.focus: Ambitious tech founders; equity-free elite cohort
programs.status_detail: Selective, equity-free 24/7 workspace + community. Launched 2025; 80+ startups supported in year one. Luntmakargatan 34.
programs.highlight: Nordic 'residents' model — no equity, all resources free.

programs.name: Founders House — Helsinki
programs.status_detail: Helsinki hub opened early 2026, expanding the Stockholm model.
programs.highlight: Finnish expansion of Founders House.

programs.name: London Founder House
programs.focus: 'The most obsessed founders in London' (non-competing markets)
programs.status_detail: Hacker house + residency + community. Notably asks residents to have raised ~$500k. Live-and-build SF energy in London.
programs.highlight: Founder mansion offering acceptance & community against startup loneliness.

programs.name: Threshold (UK) — upcoming
programs.status_detail: Flagged as an upcoming UK founder program. As of June 2026 there is little public/indexed information — placeholder pending verification of location, terms & operator.
programs.highlight: UNVERIFIED — added on user tip; confirm details before relying on this entry.

programs.name: The Residency — Inventors (SF)
programs.focus: Inventors — researchers, founders & creatives doing something novel
programs.status_detail: The Inventors Residency: high-agency builders lock in for 12 weeks to make something never done before.
programs.highlight: SF 'inventors' house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — SF2
programs.focus: Hardware & deep tech — humanoid robots, BCIs, rockets
programs.status_detail: 'A hacker house like no other': rapid iteration, ship-fast energy; robots in the bedrooms, rocket launches in the backyard.
programs.highlight: SF deep-tech house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Odyssey (SF)
programs.status_detail: 'If what you're building is so ambitious it scares you — Odyssey is for you.'
programs.highlight: SF 'purpose-driven' house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Biopunk (SF)
programs.focus: Biotech — community biolab; DIY, rebellious, collaborative
programs.status_detail: Community biolab and home for biologists & the wildly curious; late-night CRISPR and open lab nights.
programs.highlight: SF biotech house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — v2 (Vancouver)
programs.focus: Creative technologists — artistic taste meets tech
programs.status_detail: Spacious Vancouver home blending art and engineering; many residents from Atelier (Vancouver's Socratica).
programs.highlight: Canada house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Founding Co. (Hyderabad)
programs.focus: Founders already in motion — costs covered + stipend
programs.status_detail: Hyderabad's first dedicated founder hacker house: 12 founders, full costs covered, monthly stipend, weekly demo days & investor intros.
programs.highlight: High-accountability Indian founder house surfaced via The Residency network.

programs.name: Focal Founder Residency
programs.status_detail: 3+ month fully in-person residency at The LAB Miami (Wynwood); Miami relocation required (all co-founders), 6 days/wk, 10 founders, costs offset, optional $25K–$50K SAFE. Winter 2026 cohort started Jan 2026 — check site for next.
programs.highlight: 'All the firepower of a top accelerator without the heavy dilution' — but genuinely residential (you relocate to Miami).

programs.name: Frontier Tower (BerlinHouse)
programs.focus: Frontier tech & arts — AI, crypto, biotech, longevity, deep tech
programs.operator: Jakob Drzazga & Christian Nagel (Deep Ink Ventures)
programs.status_detail: 16-floor 'vertical village' at 995 Market St with 8 themed labs + co-living residences. Originally named Berlin House.
programs.highlight: A whole tower as a hacker house — co-living floors stacked over themed frontier-tech labs.

programs.name: Hive Coliving (Founder House)
programs.status_detail: 50-bedroom co-living + co-working house at 1040 Folsom St, SoMa.
programs.highlight: Large SoMa co-living house oriented to founders & builders.

programs.name: Launch House
programs.operator: Michael Houck, Brett Goldstein & Jacob Peters
programs.status_detail: Pioneered the 4-week live-in residency (a Beverly Hills mansion) + year-long community; the live-in model later wound down / pivoted. Listed for reference.
programs.highlight: Iconic early-2020s 'new-age hacker house' that popularized the live-in founder residency.

programs.name: Hexa House
programs.status_detail: New SF home for AI founders, opened by European startup studio Hexa as its Bay Area base.
programs.highlight: Hexa's US expansion — a live-and-build house for AI founders.

programs.name: Project6
programs.status_detail: Runs 48-hour founder residencies in rented mansions; first cohorts (2026) in Johor Bahru, Kuala Lumpur & Singapore (with AI.SEA).
programs.highlight: Southeast-Asian experiment in ultra-short, intense founder residencies.

programs.name: SHACK15
programs.status_detail: 46,000 sq ft community & coworking club in the Ferry Building (Scandinavian design). Not residential, but a major founder gathering hub.
programs.highlight: SF's Ferry Building founder community & events club.

programs.name: Bili House
programs.focus: AI, dev tools & B2B startup founders
programs.status_detail: Rolling applications; 1–3 month stays ($500–$2,000/mo). 7,000 sq ft waterfront house on Meydenbauer Bay with pool and boat dock.
programs.highlight: Seattle area's flagship founder hacker house — waterfront mansion in Bellevue supporting the Pacific Northwest startup scene.

programs.name: Hacker Residency Group
programs.operator: Travis Fischer, Tony Dinh & Minh-Phuc Tran
programs.status_detail: 6-week live-in batches (Batch 2 ran Apr–Jun 2026) in a 14-bedroom ocean-view villa. Completely free: no equity, no revenue share. Demo day with livestream + up to $100K funding for top teams.
programs.highlight: Led by world-class indie hackers (Tony Dinh: $1M+ ARR solo; Travis Fischer: 2 exits). Vietnam's premier founder residency.

programs.name: Yale Entrepreneurial Society Hacker House
programs.operator: Yale Entrepreneurial Society (Leia Ryan & Oliver Hime)
programs.status_detail: Summer 2026 (late May–July): 12 Yale founders in a Nob Hill house for 10 weeks. Sponsored by Raymond Tonsing (Caffeinated Capital). First edition.
programs.highlight: Yale's first SF hacker house — elite student founders plugging directly into the Bay Area ecosystem for a summer.

programs.name: Y Combinator
programs.status_detail: Now funds ~1,000 companies/yr across multiple batches. $500K total ($125K for 7% + $375K MFN SAFE), 3 months in SF.
programs.highlight: 5,000+ alumni companies; the reference point for the whole category.

programs.name: Techstars
programs.status_detail: Dozens of city/vertical programs worldwide; $20K for 5% + $200K MFN SAFE.
programs.highlight: One of the largest global accelerator networks.

programs.name: a16z Speedrun
programs.status_detail: SR007 apps closed May 17, 2026; cohort runs late Jul–Oct 2026. Up to $1M. <0.4% acceptance.
programs.highlight: a16z's ultra-competitive in-house accelerator.

programs.name: 500 Global (Flagship)
programs.status_detail: 4-month Flagship in Palo Alto, $150K for 6%; batches several times a year.
programs.highlight: Global accelerator + fund active across 80+ countries.

programs.name: Pear VC (PearX)
programs.status_detail: 12-week program, $250K–$2M, max ~20 companies.
programs.highlight: Boutique, high-touch Bay Area accelerator.

programs.name: Alchemist Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 6-month program, $25K–$50K; B2B/enterprise focus.
programs.highlight: The go-to enterprise-focused accelerator.

programs.name: LAUNCH Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 14–15 weeks, $125K for 7%.
programs.highlight: Founder-friendly accelerator from Jason Calacanis.

programs.name: Founder Institute
programs.status_detail: 4-month program; runs in 200+ cities worldwide; equity via warrants.
programs.highlight: The world's largest pre-seed accelerator by geographic reach.

programs.name: AI Grant
programs.status_detail: $250K uncapped SAFE + $600K+ in credits for AI-native startups.
programs.highlight: High-signal AI accelerator from Friedman & Gross.

programs.name: Conviction Embed
programs.status_detail: 8-week program; $150K–$250K uncapped MFN SAFE + large cloud credits.
programs.highlight: AI-first program from Conviction.

programs.name: Betaworks Camp
programs.status_detail: 12-week NYC program, up to $500K, themed AI 'Camps.'
programs.highlight: Long-running NYC studio + camp model.

programs.name: MassChallenge
programs.status_detail: 4-month program, NO EQUITY, $200K+ in prizes; Boston/Texas/Switzerland/Israel.
programs.highlight: Major equity-free accelerator network.

programs.name: Plug and Play
programs.status_detail: 12-week programs, NO EQUITY; global corporate-innovation platform.
programs.highlight: World's largest corporate-innovation/accelerator platform.

programs.name: Sequoia Arc
programs.status_detail: Open to Sequoia-backed founders only; 4-day/4-week intensive, $500K–$1M.
programs.highlight: Sequoia's structured company-building program.

programs.name: Entrepreneur First (EF)
programs.status_detail: Builds teams from individuals; also Paris, Bangalore, NYC & SF. ~$80–100K for 8–10%.
programs.highlight: Pioneered 'talent investing' — backing people before they have a company.
programs.fundingAmount: Up to $250K ($125K for 8% + optional $125K MFN); explore stage: $10K equity-free grant
programs.notes: Backs individuals pre-team with cofounder matching. US program includes an SF residency for the first ~3 months.

programs.name: Antler
programs.status_detail: 30+ global locations; ~6-week residency + investment phase, $100K–$190K for ~10%, +$250K follow-on.
programs.highlight: Among the most geographically distributed day-zero programs.

programs.name: Seedcamp
programs.status_detail: €100K–€200K for ~7%; portfolio includes Wise, Revolut, UiPath.
programs.highlight: 'Europe's seed fund' — flagship early-stage program.

programs.name: Station F
programs.focus: All sectors; 1,000+ startups under one roof
programs.status_detail: World's largest startup campus; home to ~30 programs (Founders Program, Fighters, partner accelerators).
programs.highlight: The world's biggest startup campus, in a former Paris railway depot.

programs.name: Startup Wise Guys
programs.status_detail: Up to €65K for equity; one of Europe's most active B2B accelerators.
programs.highlight: Leading Central/Eastern European B2B accelerator.

programs.name: Tehnopol Startup Incubator
programs.status_detail: ~6-month accelerator, ~10 companies per cohort; startup must be registered in Estonia. A 2026 application deadline of 18 Feb 2026 was cited in coverage — re-verify exact current dates.
programs.highlight: Tallinn Science Park's deep/green/space-tech accelerator.

programs.name: Prototron
programs.operator: Prototron Foundation (Tehnopol, Swedbank, Tartu Science Park)
programs.status_detail: Non-dilutive grants of up to ~€35K to build prototypes; round-based open calls — re-verify current round and amount.
programs.highlight: Estonian non-dilutive prototype grant fund.

programs.name: Estonian Startup Visa
programs.focus: Relocation / soft-landing for non-EU startup founders
programs.status_detail: National scheme letting non-EU founders relocate to build, or hire from abroad; always open.
programs.highlight: Relocate to Estonia to build your startup.

programs.name: APX
programs.status_detail: Up to €500K (typically €50K for 5%); rolling intake in Berlin.
programs.highlight: Berlin's joint Axel Springer–Porsche early-stage accelerator.

programs.name: Founders Factory
programs.status_detail: Accelerator + studio with corporate partners; also operates in Africa.
programs.highlight: Corporate-backed European accelerator and venture studio.

programs.name: Wayra (Telefónica)
programs.status_detail: Telefónica's open-innovation accelerator across Europe & LatAm hubs.
programs.highlight: One of the largest corporate accelerators by footprint.

programs.name: Hub71
programs.focus: Tech startups; AI, fintech, climate, deep tech
programs.status_detail: AED 250K cash (SAFE) + AED 250K in-kind; 'Access' track up to AED 500K equity-free, plus subsidized housing/office. Partners with Techstars Hub71.
programs.highlight: Abu Dhabi's flagship global tech ecosystem.

programs.name: Flat6Labs
programs.status_detail: $30K–$250K; programs across Cairo, Riyadh, Abu Dhabi, Bahrain & beyond. 200+ startups since 2011.
programs.highlight: The MENA region's seed-accelerator mainstay.

programs.name: MEST Africa
programs.status_detail: Entrepreneur training + seed fund + hubs across Accra, Lagos, Nairobi & Cape Town.
programs.highlight: Long-running pan-African founder training + seed program.

programs.name: Startupbootcamp AfriTech
programs.status_detail: Part of the global Startupbootcamp family; AfriTech runs from Cape Town.
programs.highlight: Africa arm of a global industry-accelerator family.

programs.name: Founders Factory Africa
programs.status_detail: African arm of Founders Factory; build + scale programs.
programs.highlight: Pan-African accelerator and venture studio.

programs.name: Platanus Ventures
programs.status_detail: $200K for ~7% (historically); 2026 calls open + Latam hackathon tour across 5 cities. 'The YC of LatAm.'
programs.highlight: Chile's YC-style accelerator, now expanding pan-regionally.

programs.name: Start-Up Chile
programs.status_detail: Public accelerator with equity-free grants; among the top accelerators in LatAm.
programs.highlight: Pioneering government-run accelerator; a LatAm anchor.

programs.name: NXTP
programs.status_detail: Most pan-regional early-stage firm in LatAm (Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Mexico, Peru, Brazil).
programs.highlight: LatAm's most active early-stage regional investor.

programs.name: Peak XV Surge
programs.status_detail: 16-week hybrid program; up to $3M seed; ~4,800 apps/cohort. Surge 11 = 23 startups.
programs.highlight: The premier India/SEA seed program.

programs.name: Iterative
programs.status_detail: Two 12-week programs/yr; $150K–$500K for ~10–15%.
programs.highlight: YC-style accelerator for Southeast Asia.

programs.name: Startmate
programs.status_detail: 12-week program; ~AUD $120K at $1.5M post; ANZ's leading accelerator.
programs.highlight: The anchor accelerator for Australia & New Zealand.

programs.name: Creative Destruction Lab (CDL)
programs.status_detail: 9-month objectives-based mentoring, NO EQUITY; 15+ global sites.
programs.highlight: Objectives-driven deep-tech program spun out of U of Toronto.

programs.name: Antler India
programs.status_detail: India arm of Antler's day-zero model; co-founder matching + first cheque.
programs.highlight: Antler's fast-growing India program.

programs.name: IndieBio (SOSV)
programs.status_detail: 4-month program (SF/NYC), ~$525K for ~10%; lab access included.
programs.highlight: Leading biology-focused accelerator with wet-lab space.

programs.name: HAX (SOSV)
programs.status_detail: 6 months in Newark (+ Shenzhen/Pune/Tokyo); $250K initial.
programs.highlight: Lab-based hard-tech program with global build sites.

programs.name: gener8tor
programs.status_detail: GBeta + full accelerator across 40+ US programs; ~$100K investments.
programs.highlight: Prolific accelerator network across mid-America.

programs.name: StartX (Stanford)
programs.status_detail: 3-month program, NO EQUITY, $1M+ in resources; 1,300+ companies, 20 unicorns.
programs.highlight: Stanford's non-profit, equity-free accelerator and founder community.

programs.name: Berkeley SkyDeck
programs.status_detail: $200K for 7.5%, 6-month program, Demo Day to 600+ investors. Batch 23 apps open in July.
programs.highlight: UC Berkeley's flagship accelerator.

programs.name: Capital Factory
programs.status_detail: 1% for up to $100K via All Access Fund + coworking, mentorship; ~2,000 investments since 2009.
programs.highlight: 'Center of gravity for entrepreneurs' outside Silicon Valley — Austin's anchor.

programs.name: MuckerLab
programs.status_detail: $100K–$175K for 10–15%; long-term, highly selective LA program.
programs.highlight: LA's leading operator-led accelerator.

programs.name: Forum Ventures
programs.focus: B2B SaaS, AI/LLM, fintech, supply chain
programs.status_detail: $100K from accelerator (also Studio $250K, fund $500K–$1M); 100+ companies/yr. NY/SF/Toronto.
programs.highlight: Prolific B2B-SaaS pre-seed accelerator + AI venture studio.

programs.name: Conception X
programs.status_detail: Venture program turning PhD researchers into deep-tech founders; equity-light.
programs.highlight: UK's deep-tech PhD-to-startup venture program.

programs.name: Outlier Ventures
programs.status_detail: 9-week Base Camp accelerator; current Injective Catalyst cohort open. Partners with Polkadot, Polygon, Filecoin.
programs.highlight: The leading dedicated Web3 accelerator.

programs.name: Kickstart Innovation
programs.status_detail: 2-month program, CHF 10K allowance + VC/partner network; one of Europe's largest zero-equity programs.
programs.highlight: Switzerland's flagship corporate-innovation accelerator.

programs.name: Rockstart
programs.status_detail: 6-month programs; SAFE + follow-on up to €2M. Amsterdam, Copenhagen & Bogotá.
programs.highlight: Long-running European domain-focused accelerator.

programs.name: Norrsken Impact Accelerator
programs.status_detail: 8-week sprint at Norrsken House Stockholm for early-stage impact startups.
programs.highlight: Europe's flagship impact accelerator (Niklas Adalberth, Klarna co-founder).

programs.name: Norrsken House Kigali
programs.status_detail: East Africa's largest startup hub; built to house 1,000+ entrepreneurs.
programs.highlight: Norrsken's African campus — a continental hub.

programs.name: CcHub (Co-Creation Hub)
programs.status_detail: Africa's largest innovation ecosystem; hubs in Nigeria, Rwanda, Namibia & Togo.
programs.highlight: The anchor innovation hub of West Africa.

programs.name: The Baobab Network
programs.status_detail: $50K investments + hands-on accelerator for African startups.
programs.highlight: Active pan-African pre-seed accelerator out of Nairobi.

programs.name: Sheraa
programs.status_detail: Sharjah Startup Studio (S3) applications open; founder-first programs since 2016.
programs.highlight: Sharjah's flagship founder ecosystem.

programs.name: MiraclePlus
programs.status_detail: Successor to YC China; runs Spring/Fall batches. 2026 Fall batch applications upcoming.
programs.highlight: China's leading YC-style accelerator, led by Lu Qi.

programs.name: SparkLabs
programs.status_detail: Seoul-based accelerator + global network of funds (incl. SparkLabs Saudi/KSU Fund I).
programs.highlight: Korea's flagship accelerator with a global footprint.

programs.name: 100X.VC
programs.status_detail: Backs pre-seed startups with ₹25 lakh via iSAFE; ~200-startup Fund II.
programs.highlight: India's prolific iSAFE-based pre-seed program.

programs.name: Axilor Ventures
programs.status_detail: 100-day program, ~10–15 startups/batch, ₹25 lakh for ~5%.
programs.highlight: Structured Indian accelerator from Infosys co-founders.

programs.name: T-Hub
programs.status_detail: One of India's largest innovation hubs; typically 0–2% equity or equity-free programs.
programs.highlight: India's largest government-backed startup hub.

programs.name: Latitud
programs.status_detail: Latitud Fellowship + Ventures; backs early-stage LatAm tech (fintech, SaaS, marketplaces).
programs.highlight: LatAm's founder community, fellowship and early-stage fund.

programs.name: Open Network Lab (Onlab)
programs.status_detail: Japan's pioneering seed accelerator; mentorship + Demo Day.
programs.highlight: One of Japan's longest-running seed accelerators.

programs.name: F/ai (Station F)
programs.operator: Station F (Xavier Niel), backed by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft & Mistral
programs.status_detail: 2 batches of 20 companies/yr. $1M+ in AI credits + model access from all major labs. 0% equity. Recommendation-only selection. Launched Jan 2026.
programs.highlight: The first accelerator backed by every major AI lab simultaneously — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft, Mistral, plus Sequoia & General Catalyst. Free.

programs.name: Antler ONE
programs.status_detail: Launched March 2026. €500K initial (€200K for 8.5% + €300K matching) + up to €30M follow-on. Hubs: Berlin, Amsterdam, Munich, Paris. Top 0.3% of applicants (from ~10,000).
programs.highlight: Antler's new flagship for Continental Europe — 6–10 week intensive with €500K at entry and a runway to €30M Series-C follow-on.

programs.name: CDL-Doha
programs.operator: Creative Destruction Lab / ESMT Berlin / HEC Paris, funded by QIA & QRDI
programs.status_detail: Launched Feb 2026; CDL's first Gulf/Asia site. ~20 ventures/stream/yr (3 streams), no equity, objectives-based mentoring from global scientists & operators.
programs.highlight: CDL's Middle East expansion — science-based deep-tech program at the crossroads of European expertise and Gulf capital.

programs.name: AcceleratorX
programs.focus: Seed-stage AI startups — marketing, adtech, healthtech, fintech
programs.status_detail: Cohort 1 open (Sep–Nov 2026, Demo Day Vienna). 3-month online program; distribution via 32-country agency network. Launched May 2026.
programs.highlight: Europe's first accelerator built around distribution — 2,000+ pilot-ready clients from day one, via the EU's largest marketing agency alliance.

programs.name: Google DeepMind APAC Accelerator (AI for the Planet)
programs.focus: Climate, nature conservation, sustainable agriculture & renewable energy
programs.status_detail: 3-month 2026 program; in-person bootcamp in Singapore. Open to APAC startups, research teams & non-profits. Mentorship from DeepMind & Google AI experts; no equity taken.
programs.highlight: Google DeepMind's first APAC accelerator — uses frontier AI models to tackle climate and environmental challenges across Asia Pacific.
